generated_oml:
{
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing point cloud data for object detection"
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing vehicle state data including speed, position, and orientation"
]

instance MotorActuationFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring actual motor actuation state for feedback control"
]

instance SteeringServoFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering servo position and movement"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance MotorActuationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorActuationFeedbackSensor
]

instance SteeringServoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoFeedbackSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from physical sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [ ComputationOffloadingEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler ]
]

instance MotorActuationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor actuation feedback data including current position and speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorActuationDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringServoData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo position and movement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered object tracks derived from LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [ DataTranslationEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler ]
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point clouds into clustered object tracks for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes, aligns message types, and converts units for object track data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation tasks including lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands from vehicle ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables real-time visualization of vehicle data and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables remote control of ACC system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle speed, position, and orientation"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path based on current vehicle state and environment"
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from LiDAR point cloud clustering"
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to generate and save operational reports"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to control vehicle acceleration or braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to enable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to set target speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time vehicle state monitoring, projected driving paths, object tracks, and report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides [ RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ProjectedPathInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, ReportGenerationAction ]
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system tasks including lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands from vehicle ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:provides [ LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, ActuationCommandAction ]
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote control of ACC system, including enabling/disabling, setting desired speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides [ EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction ]
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization interface for real-time vehicle state and object tracking"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control interface for remote management commands"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Handles data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication"
    base:contains [ LiDARSensor, VehicleStateSensor, MotorActuationFeedbackSensor, SteeringServoFeedbackSensor ]
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manages data and control mechanisms for the Digital Twin"
    base:contains [ PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler ]
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User-facing interface for monitoring and control"
    base:contains [ ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel ]
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., ACC-related signals) from the ACC Controlling FE are transmitted to Motor and Steering Servo actuators via Wi-Fi UDP. The Data Translation component handles serialization and unit conversions for control messages."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading due to hardware limitations, which is less stringent than safety-critical vehicular standards mandating stricter synchronization (<100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA standards, implemented via ROS2 where each Functional Entity (FE) is encapsulated as an individual ROS2 package containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The Physical Twin Entity, a deviation from ISO 23247's OME, hosts general automotive functionality such as Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, with all entities deployed on distinct hardware and coordinated through ROS2 communication channels."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-component communication uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication (Physical, Digital, User) occurs over Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-2:2021 defines a reference architecture with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) perform tasks such as actuating OME, data transformation, and user interfacing; implementation details are not specified by the standard, with OPC Unified Architecture cited as a potential technology choice."
]
